title: Plugin manifest
description: Unified plugin manifest schema. A single document type supports both contract_version 1 (synchronous-only) and contract_version 2 (adds the deferred completion protocol). This schema is domain-neutral: it describes generic plugin metadata and action wiring only, with no courseware- or content-specific fields.

version.description: The plugin's own release version, independent of contract_version.

completion_mode.description: sync (default): the plugin's invoke response is the final result. deferred: the plugin's invoke response only accepts the request; the final result arrives later via a completion event and/or operation status polling. Only meaningful when the manifest's contract_version is 2.

interaction_mode.description: none (default): no browser handoff is required. launch_url: the plugin requires the end user to continue the action in a browser context reachable via a launch URL. Only meaningful when the manifest's contract_version is 2.

operation_status.description: Absolute HTTPS base URL of the plugin's operation status API. The host appends the canonical path /operations/{operation_id} (see docs/protocol.md and openapi/plugin-api.yaml) to poll this action's deferred operations.
